special_mechanics.name: 8-directional movement
special_mechanics.description: Player can move character in eight directions across the screen

special_mechanics.name: Power-up system
special_mechanics.description: Collecting capsules and bells from defeated enemies to fill power gauge and activate special effects such as increased firepower, temporary invulnerability, or score multipliers

tier_notes: Tier 3 game with only qualitative gameplay documentation available. Wikipedia source documents game mechanics and design features but contains no quantitative physics parameters. As a horizontal-scrolling shooter with 8-directional movement, precise movement physics are not publicly documented.
